title: nf-alignment pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for aligning sequencing data using BWA, BWAmem2, Bowtie2 or STAR.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

alignmentCSV.description: Path to the CSV file containing FASTQ file information and metadata.

bamDir.description: Directory where aligned BAM files will be written.

sampleBamDir.description: Directory where merged sample BAM files and coverage files will be written.

aligner.description: Alignment tool to use for mapping reads to the reference genome.

endType.description: Whether the sequencing is single-read or paired-end.

markDuplicates.description: Whether to mark PCR duplicates in the aligned BAM files.

mergeSamples.description: Whether to merge FASTQ files belonging to the same sample into a single BAM per sample.

chunkSize.description: Number of FASTQ reads per chunk when splitting input files.

basenameExtractPattern.description: Regular expression pattern used to extract the basename from FASTQ file names.

basenameCaptureGroup.description: Which capture group from basenameExtractPattern to use as the basename.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome and index paths used for alignment.

species.description: Species name with underscores replacing spaces (e.g. 'homo_sapiens').

shortSpecies.description: Species abbreviation used in file name construction (e.g. 'hsa' for Homo sapiens).

referenceRoot.description: Root directory path containing reference genome data. Index and annotation paths are derived from this if not set explicitly.

referenceFasta.description: Path to the reference genome FASTA file. Derived from referenceRoot, species and assembly if not set.

bwaIndex.description: Path prefix for the BWA reference index. Required when aligner is 'bwa'. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

bwamem2Index.description: Path prefix for the BWAmem2 reference index. Required when aligner is 'bwamem', 'bwa_mem', 'bwamem2' or 'bwa_mem2'. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

bowtie2Index.description: Path prefix for the Bowtie2 reference index. Required when aligner is 'bowtie' or 'bowtie2'. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

starIndex.description: Path to the STAR reference genome directory. Required when aligner is 'star'. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

genomeSizes.description: Path to the genome sizes file listing chromosome/contig names and lengths. Required when createCoverage is true. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

referenceRefFlat.description: Path to the reference gene annotation in RefFlat format. Required when rnaseqMetrics is true. Derived from referenceRoot if not set.

aligner_specific_options.title: Aligner-specific options
aligner_specific_options.description: Additional command-line options passed directly to the alignment tools.

bwaAlnOptions.description: Additional command-line options for the BWA 'aln' command (classic BWA only).

bwaSamOptions.description: Additional command-line options for the BWA 'samse' or 'sampe' command.

metrics_options.title: Metrics options
metrics_options.description: Options controlling which quality metrics are calculated.

alignmentMetrics.description: Whether to calculate alignment summary metrics for aligned BAM files.

insertSizeMetrics.description: Whether to calculate insert size metrics. Applies to paired-end data only.

wgsMetrics.description: Whether to calculate whole genome sequencing (WGS) coverage metrics.

rnaseqMetrics.description: Whether to calculate RNA-seq metrics using a RefFlat annotation file.

rnaseqStrandSpecificity.description: Strand specificity for RNA-seq metrics calculation. Defaults to SECOND_READ_TRANSCRIPTION_STRAND for paired-end or FIRST_READ_TRANSCRIPTION_STRAND for single-end if not set.

coverage_options.title: Coverage options
coverage_options.description: Options for generating genome coverage tracks.

createCoverage.description: Whether to create bedgraph and bigwig coverage files. Only applies when mergeSamples is true.

software_version_options.title: Software version options
software_version_options.description: Versions of alignment tools used when constructing reference index directory paths.

bwaVersion.description: BWA version used in reference index directory path construction.

bwamem2Version.description: BWAmem2 version used in reference index directory path construction.

bowtie2Version.description: Bowtie2 version used in reference index directory path construction.

starVersion.description: STAR version used in reference index directory path construction.
